response.justification: Bogdan possesses exceptional technical skills, including advanced TypeScript, React, and AWS experience, which perfectly align with the required tech stack. However, with nearly two decades of experience and current titles of Staff and Senior Software Engineer, he is massively overqualified for this Junior/Entry-Level position. His salary expectations and career trajectory will almost certainly clash with the limited scope and responsibilities of this role.
strengths: Deep expertise in TypeScript, React, and Node.js across highly scalable architectures.
Strong alignment with nice-to-have qualifications, including LLM integrations, AWS, and Kubernetes.
Proven track record of software craftsmanship, clean architecture, and TDD.
concerns: Massively overqualified for an entry-level/junior position with nearly 20 years of experience.
Extremely high risk of misalignment regarding salary expectations and job responsibilities.
Recent heavy reliance on NoSQL (MongoDB) rather than the preferred relational databases (PostgreSQL).
